semantic.role: View service module that renders architectural view artifacts (risk hotspots, CLI entries, MCP entries, module entries, public surface) into formatted markdown reports using filesystem-loaded templates.
responsibilities: Loads and caches markdown templates from the filesystem using template names.
Renders risk hotspot views with severity scoring, details formatting, and markdown escaping.
Renders CLI command entry views with command descriptions and metadata.
Renders MCP (Model Context Protocol) server entry views with tool and resource listings.
Renders module entry views with entrypoint, kind, symbols, confidence, and summary.
Escapes markdown inline symbols to prevent formatting issues in output.
Formats confidence scores and kinds for display in markdown.
outOfScope: Fetching or generating the view artifact data (relies on imported types).
Serving markdown over HTTP or other protocols.
Persisting rendered output to databases or external systems.
Validating schema of input data beyond basic rendering.
invariants: Uples filesystem (fs, path) to load and cache templates from disk.
Output is always markdown formatted with proper escaping.
Static class methods for each view artifact type (risk hotspots, CLI, MCP, modules).
Depends on centralized view types from '../../types/view.js'.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reusable, template-driven markdown rendering service for architectural view artifacts to support documentation and reporting.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Tighten schema handling and add try preview (likely related to template rendering or input validation, but not directly evidenced in AST).
